_comment: Shipped preset for LTX-Video 2.3 22B image-to-video (from ComfyUI's bundled video_ltx2_3_i2v template). Outer graph: LoadImage #269 -> subgraph instance #320 -> SaveVideo #75. After graphToPrompt the inner prompt node becomes composite '320:319'. We override the outer LoadImage (the first/source frame) with the wired upstream image; the prompt drives the subgraph's text branch.
label: Local LTX 2.3 I2V
description: LTX-Video 2.3 22B image-to-video. Takes a source frame + prompt, outputs a 5s 720p clip by default. Requires ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors (+ distilled lora + Gemma3 text encoder + LTX 2.3 spatial upscaler) — see workflows/video/README.md.

value.default: Cinematic motion of the subject, natural movement.

image.error: LTX 2.3 I2V needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's images slot, or pick Local LTX 2.3 T2V for pure text-to-video.
